task:
In Google Chrome, load file:///home/user/Documents/md_editor.html ('Markdown Playground' with a `#source` textarea and a live `#preview` div).

Place exactly this Markdown into `#source`, preserving line breaks:

```
# Project Status

- Finish docs
- Review pull requests
- Deploy to staging

```
npm run build
```
```

The live `#preview` must render an `<h1>` with text `Project Status`, a `<ul>` with three `<li>` bullets (`Finish docs`, `Review pull requests`, `Deploy to staging`), and a `<pre><code>` block containing `npm run build`. Leave the page in this state.

verification.eval: 'Project Status' in (result.get('value') or '') and 'Finish docs' in (result.get('value') or '')
verification.description: Source textarea contains the required markdown content
Preview contains an h1 with text 'Project Status'
Preview contains a <ul> with at least 3 <li> children

verification.command: eval "document.querySelector('#preview pre code') && document.querySelector('#preview pre code').textContent"
verification.description: Preview code block contains 'npm run build'
